extortion.description: Part of the ESG groupEast of Scotland Growers are a farmer owned growing cooperative based in Cupar, Fife. Our main crops are Broccoli, Brussels sprouts & Cauliflower, along with a wider range of vegetable crops produced in the fertile Scottish soils over a 180 mile radius.Established in 1987 with the purpose of providing the individual grower the benefits of being part of a larger group, allowing all members to grow together for the future.  ESG are recognised by the European Union as a Producer Organisation; a producer organisation being a group of growers that work collectively as an organisation for the benefit of the grower. ESG take great pride in this recognition.Geo: United Kingdom - Leak size: 80 GB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
